response.step_by_step_log: 1. Observed a song performance from 00:00. Metadata 'SNAKE EYES' and Hakos Baelz identified on screen. 2. Confirmed via context (her talking about it as 'my new song') that she is the artist. 3. Performed web search for 'Hakos Baelz Snake Eyes lyrics'. 4. Retrieved full lyrics and translation from search result. 5. Mapped the remaining video segments as commentary and merchandise promotion without vocal music.
response.global_summary: The video features a full vocal performance of Hakos Baelz's original song 'SNAKE EYES', followed by a commentary segment where she discusses the production and choreography, and concludes with a promotional showcase of birthday merchandise.

scenes.description: Performance of the original song 'SNAKE EYES' by Hakos Baelz with two backup dancers. Text overlays identify the song title and hashtag.

Shake it off, what goes around Shut your mouth, will come back down Ready the fight, Ready the screaming Abracadabra let's go Watch it we reapin it all (reapin it all) 꺾이지 않는 의지 될대로 돼볼래 Play Reason, Our demon Believe in the beaten Just wait and see We hit that high Snake eyes, Snake eyes Come on now don't be shy Snake eyes, Snake eyes 뜨겁게 달아올라 (불타올라) 놀자all day all night All day all night Let the beat drop! Go! We Go hard (Go hard) 기사회생 전부를 걸어Bet Go! We Go hard I want it all 다시 일어나 파괴와 재생 죽지않아, 전부걸어 맞서 싸워, 시작이야 Take the crown 끝까지 달려가 Rule the game We'll hit that high Snake eyes, Snake eyes Come on now don't be shy Snake eyes, Snake eyes 같이 춤을 춰봐, 이렇게 멈출순 없어 같이 Dance all night 준비～! scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(준비) Ready!
That's good game, what a shame
Players, they all complain
Why me? No, not again!
(Shout!)
Ratatata~
But! Ain't got time so dry those eyes
Look around what's that I spy
The Broken and Bruised
All got something to prove now
Abracadabra let's go
Watch them like dice as they fall (they fall)
끝까지 가보자 (Go) Go all the way to the end
나는 내 맘 대로해 (Hey) I do as I please
Double one, Double win
Lowly to Lottery
Do or Die
We hit that high
(Snake eyes, Snake eyes)
Come on now don't be shy
(Snake eyes, Snake eyes)
뜨겁게 달아올라 (불타올라) Heating up (Burning up)
놀자 all day all night (all day all night)
So turn it up can't stop won't stop preachin
Who said the sky's the limit?
Show them that we mean business
We are the young and vicious
Snake eyes they never lie
Fly high with pride and leave your fears behind
지겨워! (It's boring!)
우리 들의 광란의 Party (Our wild party)
보여줄게 환상 Safari (I'll show you a fantasy Safari)
Baddie, baddie, nobody can stop me
끼리끼리 붙어, Come on closer!
Go! Go! 더 빨리 (Check It Out) Go! Go! Faster!
Actin all Naughty
싹다 부셔 모조리 (Destroy it all)
모조리 싹다다다다! (All of it, ratatata!)
Shake it off, what goes around
Shut your mouth, will come back down
Ready the fight, Ready the screaming
Abracadabra let's go
Watch it, we reapin it all (reapin it all)
꺾이지 않는 의지 (Unbreakable will)
될 대로 돼볼래 Play (Will be what it will be, Play)
Reason, Our demon
Believe in the beaten
Just wait and see
We hit that high
(Snake eyes, Snake eyes)
Come on now don't be shy
(Snake eyes, Snake eyes)
뜨겁게 달아올라 (불타올라) Heating up (Burning up)
놀자 all day all night (all day all night)
Let the beat drop!
Go! We Go hard (Go hard)
기사회생 전부를 걸어 (Bet) Raise from the dead, bet it all
Go! We Go hard
I want it all
다시 일어나 파괴와 재생 (Rise again, destruction and rebirth)
죽지않아, 전부 걸어 (Don't die, bet it all)
맞서 싸워, 시작이야 (Fight back, it's the start)
Take the crown
끝까지 달려가 Rule (Run to the end, Rule)
(We'll hit that high)
We hit that eye
(Snake eyes, Snake eyes)
Come on now don't be shy
(Snake eyes, Snake eyes)
같이 춤을 춰봐, 이렇게 (Dance together, like this)
멈출순 없어 같이 Dance all night (준비) (Can't stop, dance together all night (Ready))
Don't be afraid of losing
It's just a new beginning
Look at the cards we dealing
Sometimes it takes a villain
Snake eyes the time is nigh
Fly high with pride and leave all fears behind!

scenes.description: Hakos Baelz provides commentary about the release of her new song, sharing details about her writing process, choreography, and anticipation for the music video premiere.
Transition leading into the merchandise reveal, where Hakos Baelz announces her birthday merchandise for 2026.
Showcase of Hakos Baelz's birthday merchandise for 2026, including a rubber mat, plushie keychain, pouch, and ASMR voice pack.
